@ahtml 0.1
@url https://shop.example.com/p/mbp-14-m3
@fetched 2026-01-01T00:00:00.000Z
@ttl 300
@etag W/"f4c2"
@page_type product_detail

@policy
  agents_welcome: yes
  license: MIT
  rate_limit: 100/min
  contact: agents@shop.example.com

@provenance
  issuer: did:web:shop.example.com
  signed: no

[product:mbp-14-m3]
  name: MacBook Pro 14" M3
  brand: Apple
  price: 1999 USD
  list_price: 2199 USD
  stock: in_stock (42)
  sku: MBP14-M3-512-SB
  rating: 4.7 (1284)

(action) purchase
  label: Buy now
  category: transact
  target: product:mbp-14-m3
  method: POST
  execute: /api/checkout
  auth: required
  cost: 1999 USD purchase
  reversible: P30D full_refund
  side_effects: charge_card, email_buyer, decrement_stock
  confirmation: required
